name: Phase 2 A/B/C Smoke Harness (v1)
short_description: Experiment harness that runs scope-aware (A), scope-unaware (B), and scope-mismatched (C) agents on FrontierScience-Olympiad rows of hierarchical-annotation-v2, paired by task_id, with budget enforcement, per-row checkpointing, and pre-registered RQ1/RQ2/RQ5 hypothesis tests.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.description: CLI entry point. Loads the v2 dataset, runs A/B/C with paired execution, persists predictions JSONL per condition, computes metrics in explicit-variant format, runs paired McNemar tests, computes confirmatory N, renders charts, and writes intermediate stats.

entry_points.name: run_condition_a
entry_points.description: Drive scope_aware_react_v1 over the v2 hierarchy of one row in phase order; return final answer plus trajectory.

entry_points.name: run_condition_b
entry_points.description: Drive scope_unaware_planandsolve_v1 over one row; return final answer plus trajectory.

entry_points.name: run_condition_c
entry_points.description: Drive matched_mismatch_v1 (random strategy) wrapping scope_unaware_planandsolve_v1 over one row; return final answer plus trajectory carrying wrong granularity tags.

entry_points.name: compute_metrics
entry_points.description: Compute task_success_rate, overconfident_error_rate, and avg_decisions_per_task from a list of RowOutcome records.

entry_points.name: judge_correctness
entry_points.description: Compare a candidate final answer against gold actions using the local Claude Code CLI judge (haiku) with retry and short-circuit normalisation.

entry_points.name: load_smoke_rows
entry_points.description: Load and filter the v2 dataset to FrontierScience-Olympiad hierarchy-complete rows.

entry_points.name: make_model_call
entry_points.description: Return a closure that invokes the local Claude Code CLI with --tools '' and --setting-sources '' to suppress the default system prompt and tool catalogue, dropping per-call cost from ~$0.10 to ~$0.005 with cache reuse.

entry_points.name: CostTracker
entry_points.description: Process-wide cumulative-spend tracker with budget enforcement; thread-safe, supports per-model breakdown.

entry_points.name: mcnemar_paired
entry_points.description: Paired McNemar test on binary correctness vectors with exact binomial fallback when discordant pairs are sparse.

entry_points.name: wilson_interval
entry_points.description: Wilson 95% confidence interval for a binomial proportion.

entry_points.name: confirmatory_n_for_paired_difference
entry_points.description: Estimate the N required to detect a target paired effect at alpha=0.05 / power=0.8 given an observed discordant rate.

entry_points.name: build_react_tool_registry
entry_points.description: Build the minimal calculator + finish tool registry used by condition A.

entry_points.name: build_planandsolve_tool_registry
entry_points.description: Build the minimal calculator + finish tool registry used by conditions B and C.
